sentences.arabic: سَأَلَتِ الْبِنْتُ أُمَّهَا: كَيْفَ أَحْفَظُ الصُّورَةَ؟
sentences.translation: Djevojčica je upitala majku: Kako da sačuvam fotografiju?
sentences.translationEn: The girl asked her mother: How do I save the photo?

sentences.arabic: قَالَتِ الْأُمُّ: اضْغَطِي عَلَى الصُّورَةِ طَوِيلًا ثُمَّ احْفَظِي.
sentences.translation: Majka je rekla: Drži fotografiju dugo pa spremi.
sentences.translationEn: The mother said: Press and hold the photo then save.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتْ: شُكْرًا يَا أُمِّي تَعَلَّمْتُ شَيْئًا جَدِيدًا.
sentences.translation: Rekla je: Hvala majko, naučila sam nešto novo.
sentences.translationEn: She said: Thank you mother, I learned something new.
